parameters.functionCode:
const prev = $input.first();
return [{ json: { job_id: prev.json.job_id, file_url: prev.json.file_url, ocr: prev.json.ocr, ai: prev.json.ai }, binary: prev.binary }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_MODEL ?? 'llama3' }}", "stream": false, "prompt": "Extract structured SLA data from this auto lease contract. Return ONLY valid JSON: {apr, monthly_payment, term, residual_value, mileage_limit, penalties}. No markdown.\n\n{{ $json.ocr_text }}" }

={ "model": "gpt-4o-mini", "temperature": 0, "messages": [{"role":"system","content":"Extract SLA data. Return ONLY JSON: {apr,monthly_payment,term,residual_value,mileage_limit,penalties}. No markdown."},{"role":"user","content":"{{ $json.ocr_text }}"}] }

={ "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "max_tokens": 1024, "messages": [{"role":"user","content":"Extract SLA data from this lease contract. Return ONLY JSON: {apr,monthly_payment,term,residual_value,mileage_limit,penalties}. No markdown.\n\n{{ $json.ocr_text }}"}] }

parameters.functionCode:
const item = $input.first();
return [{ json: { ...item.json, vin: null } }];

const item = $input.first();
return [{ json: { job_id: item.json.job_id, status: 'completed', data: { sla: { apr: item.json.sla?.apr??null, monthly_payment: item.json.sla?.monthly_payment??null, term: item.json.sla?.term??null, residual_value: item.json.sla?.residual_value??null, mileage_limit: item.json.sla?.mileage_limit??null, penalties: item.json.sla?.penalties??null }, vin: item.json.vin??null, price_estimate: item.json.price_estimate??null, fairness_score: item.json.fairness_score??null, negotiation_tips: item.json.negotiation_tips??[] } } }];
